description: The panel a signed-out screen needs — sign in, check your inbox, this link expired, a two-factor code. It knows nothing about credentials on purpose; the fields are composed inside it.

brand.description: The brand lock-up above the panel's content. An AppLogo, in practice.

eyebrow.description: Mono crimson microlabel — the product, not the task.

content.description: The fields, composed from Input and Button.

footer.description: Centred muted line below the content — a recovery link, a legal note.
